steps.title: Convert line p to slope-intercept form
steps.content:
Starting with $2y + 18x = 9$, solve for $y$:
$$2y = -18x + 9$$
$$y = -9x + \frac{9}{2}$$
The slope of line $p$ is $-9$.

steps.title: Apply the perpendicular slopes rule
steps.content:
When two lines are perpendicular, their slopes are negative reciprocals. Since line $p$ has slope $-9$, line $r$ has slope:
$$m_r = -\frac{1}{-9} = \frac{1}{9}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
